infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used for face verification during login and attendance check-in.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to track travel to and from event venues.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location is used to share travel progress with your manager.
